creator: ahicks@p-o.co.uk
text:
Created attachment 143331
Updated patch

Upstream have removed the http://www.dbmail.org/download/3.1 and only the file at http://git.dbmail.eu/paul/dbmail/snapshot/ remains

A diff check confirms the contents are exactly the same so have attached updated patch to reflect new sha256

Alas upstream no longer appear to offer checksums after December 2013.
